## Manual checks

- [ ] Main workflow checked where relevant
- [ ] At least one invalid or failure path checked where relevant

## Engineering review

- [ ] The change is one coherent task.
- [ ] Unrelated work was preserved.
- [ ] Units, coordinate frames, timestamps, and random-seed behavior were reviewed where relevant.
- [ ] Ground truth, measurements, and estimates remain correctly separated.
- [ ] Public Python, CLI, artifact, configuration, and ROS interfaces remain compatible, or changes are documented.
- [ ] New dependencies were verified.
- [ ] Security and privacy implications were reviewed.
- [ ] Tests and documentation were updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] The full diff was reviewed for secrets, debug artifacts, placeholders, and unsupported claims.
